creator: se@FreeBSD.org
text:
I just lost 1 years worth of Time Machine backups after upgrading Samba from 4.8.4_1 to 4.8.5. The macOS "sparse bundle" was damaged and could no longer be accessed.

On each attempt to create a fresh sparse bundle to start over with the backups, the backup process was aborted after writing some 10 GB (of 200 GB), leaving a corrupt sparse bundle behind.

After going back to 4.8.4_1 the backups have been working again for several days now.
